title: Fix slop scan findings

tasks.title: Classify slop findings with proof-backed resolution matrix
tasks.verification: Resolution matrix persisted in ADV design artifact via adv_change_update. Evidence recorded with adv_run_test: ESLint complexity scan found 126 complexity findings and top hotspots, pnpm why documented postcss/@temporalio/activity/@opencode-ai/sdk dependency graph, ts-prune availability check failed so deletion proof must use TypeScript/build/focused tests. Worktree is clean; no code changes for classification task.

tasks.title: Implement conformance signal visibility with spec and rejected-signal tests
tasks.verification: TDD evidence recorded. RED: pnpm test -- src/tools/conformance.test.ts failed with 3 new missing signalWarning assertions. GREEN: same focused test passed after implementation with 300000ms timeout; pnpm run typecheck passed. Implementation adds rq-confSignalVisibility01 spec/docs, structured ADV_CONFORMANCE_SIGNAL_FAILED signalWarning for lock/override/run after local save when change workflow notification fails, and rejected-signal tests preserving local state success.

tasks.title: Centralize poisoned-history recovery predicate or record explicit rationale
tasks.verification: Centralized poisoned-history recovery predicate in workflowHasPoisonedRecoveryEvidence while preserving strict describe-only behavior where required and legacy signal-error-or-describe behavior where existing contracts allowed it. Exact affected tests passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/recovery-probe.test.ts src/tools/gate.test.ts src/tools/contract.test.ts src/tools/task.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts (5 files, 129 tests); pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/conformance.test.ts (21 tests); pnpm run typecheck passed; pnpm run format:check passed after Prettier on touched source files. Earlier pnpm test pattern invocations ran unrelated broader suites and surfaced unrelated timing/projection/status failures; exact affected suites and the unexpected worktree failure rerun passed.

tasks.title: Apply proof-based deletion and dependency dispositions
tasks.verification: Proof-backed deletion/dependency disposition complete. Removed unused addTaskToChangeState/AddTaskInput after lgrep found only documentation references and typecheck/check/focused workflow-boundary tests passed. Removed direct @temporalio/activity dependency from package.json/lock after lgrep found no source imports and pnpm why showed it remains available transitively via @temporalio/worker/@temporalio/testing. Replaced worktree's direct @opencode-ai/sdk type import with local structural OpencodeClient/OpencodeEvent shapes, deleting the ambient SDK declaration; typecheck caught and drove structural compatibility fixes for log levels/session result shape. Verification: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile passed; pnpm run typecheck passed after fixes; pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/index-create.test.ts src/utils/workspace-warp.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts passed (3 files, 64 tests); pnpm run check passed; git diff --check passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Removed unused change-state task-add helper/export after lgrep confirmed no source references beyond temporal-recovery docs. Removed direct @temporalio/activity package dependency while retaining transitive availability through @temporalio/worker/@temporalio/testing. Eliminated the direct @opencode-ai/sdk type import from worktree code by moving the minimal runtime contract into plugin/src/utils/opencode-types.ts and deleting the ambient SDK declaration. Typecheck failures drove structural compatibility fixes for log level, session response, and session surface types.
tasks.notes: Proof-based deletion/dependency disposition completed and checkpointed at 65dfebd2d456950648ea6038f62d83f43da34234.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial pnpm run typecheck failed until the local structural OpencodeClient shape matched the real SDK client surface.
error_recovery.next_strategy: Resolved: structural type tightened to match actual call surface; no further retry needed.

attempts.error: pnpm run typecheck failed: log level string not assignable to SDK log level union.
attempts.diagnosis: Local structural OpencodeClient type was wider than the real SDK log contract.

attempts.error: pnpm run typecheck failed: app/session index signatures missing on real SDK App/Session types.
attempts.diagnosis: The local structural type required index signatures that the real SDK type does not expose.
attempts.fix_tried: Removed unnecessary index signatures from app/session/client surfaces.

attempts.error: pnpm run typecheck failed: SessionResponse and session.list signatures incompatible with real SDK result/option shapes.
attempts.diagnosis: The local type modeled unused session.list and required data even when SDK returns error result.
attempts.fix_tried: Made SessionResponse structurally match observed SDK result shape with optional data/error/request/response and removed unused session.list from the required surface.

tasks.title: Document complexity follow-ups and perform touched-scope same-pattern cleanup
tasks.verification: No code changes needed for complexity-only scope. Follow-up evidence documented in task completion: ROADMAP.md already tracks GitHub #82 "Reduce ESLint complexity violations across plugin/src"; fresh ESLint complexity scan at threshold 12 reports 126 findings, with top hotspots including archive.ts:350 (31), deploy-local.test.ts:580 (34), index.ts:533 (50), change.ts:3048 (86 from prior matrix/current scan top list), and other broad complexity-only areas. Touched-scope same-pattern cleanup verified with lgrep: no remaining `from "@opencode-ai/sdk"` imports and no `addTaskToChangeState` references in source. KD5/AC6 followed: no broad complexity refactor because findings are not correctness blockers for this change.
tasks.implementation_summary: Evaluated complexity-only scope against KD5/AC6. Fresh ESLint complexity scan with threshold 12 still reports 126 findings; threshold 20 reports 42 findings. Existing ROADMAP.md item #82 tracks the repo-wide follow-up "Reduce ESLint complexity violations across plugin/src". No broad refactor was performed because current complexity findings are follow-up work, not correctness blockers for this change. Touched-scope same-pattern cleanup verified no remaining source import `from "@opencode-ai/sdk"` and no remaining source references to `addTaskToChangeState`.
tasks.notes: Complexity follow-up disposition documented; no code changes needed.

Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/conformance.test.ts passed 21/21; pnpm run check passed; targeted harden rechecks resolved docs/slop findings with no regressions.
tasks.notes: Final verification and follow-up slop scan completed; no code changes in this task.

items.text: Fix silent conformance signal failure visibility.
Resolve each actionable slop-scan finding or classify it with evidence.
Use structural proof before deleting exports or dependencies.
Extract shared recovery code only where behavior-preserving and justified.
Treat risky complexity-only refactors as explicit follow-ups unless they are needed for correctness or safe cleanup.
Conformance `lock`, `override`, and `run` responses surface a structured warning when workflow notification fails after local state save.
Rejected-signal tests cover conformance notification failure paths.
Every slop finding is recorded in a resolution matrix: fixed, removed with proof, wired, documented non-actionable, or follow-up.
No export or dependency is removed without structural evidence and passing focused verification.
Repeated poisoned-history recovery fallback is centralized or explicitly left unchanged with rationale.
High-complexity handlers are refactored only when needed for correctness or safe cleanup; remaining complexity-only hotspots become follow-ups with evidence.
`pnpm run check` passes from `plugin/`; relevant focused tests pass.
Follow-up slop/deterministic scan reports no remaining actionable findings in touched scope, or documents non-blocking findings.
Preserve ADV workflow correctness, deletion safety, existing gate behavior, worktree isolation, and Temporal worker singleton guarantees.
Do not hide, swallow, or downgrade correctness-sensitive failures behind debug-only logging.
Specs remain authoritative; implementation must preserve existing ADV workflow laws.
Runtime is Bun; tests run on Node/Vitest; all build/test commands run from `plugin/`.
If Temporal workflow-bundled code changes, replay/versioning implications from `advance-workflow` must be evaluated and evidenced.
Do not treat heuristic-only, regex-only, text-only, or single-tool unused-code guesses as deletion proof.
Do not bypass ADV state tools or read ADV state files directly.
Do not reintroduce `defineUpdate` on the change workflow surface or violate workflow-bundle import safety.
Do not refactor all complexity hotspots blindly when risk exceeds correctness benefit.
Do not split or shrink the change solely because it is broad; the prep gate owns execution shape.
New ADV user-facing features unrelated to resolving the slop-scan findings.
Broad style rewrites or repo-wide churn not required by the findings.
External conformance test-source implementation or conformance policy redesign beyond surfacing tool signal failures.
Deleting public/plugin registration surfaces, generated files, tests, fixtures, examples, or command modules without structural reachability proof.

rows.evidence: Review trace: conformance.ts returns structured signalWarning for saved-success signal failures; conformance tests cover lock/override/run rejected signals.
Task tk-4b5c62e81eef persisted proof-backed resolution matrix in design; review accepted unresolved complexity items as non-blocking follow-up per ROADMAP #82 evidence.
rows.notes: No unclassified actionable slop findings found in touched scope.

rows.notes: No deletion based solely on heuristic/text guess.

rows.notes: Risky complexity-only refactors deferred with evidence.

Resolution matrix persisted in design via adv_change_update during tk-4b5c62e81eef; ADV task evidence records slop catalog classification and proof method.
rows.notes: Design artifact is ADV source of truth for matrix.

rows.notes: No unsafe deletion found in review.

rows.evidence: workflowHasPoisonedRecoveryEvidence helper implemented and tested; exact affected tests passed during execution; focused suite rerun passed 214/214.
rows.notes: Centralized predicate, not generic disk write path.

rows.evidence: Complexity findings documented as ROADMAP #82 follow-up; touched code limited to correctness/deletion/recovery; review found only suggestions/nits, no complexity blocker.
Current review reran focused affected Vitest suite: 9 files, 214 tests passed. Current review reran pnpm run check: passed.
rows.notes: Full pnpm test also passed in execution evidence.

rows.evidence: tk-049e0eac4719 deterministic slop follow-up documented 126 non-blocking complexity-only findings tracked by ROADMAP #82; touched-scope pattern scan found no direct SDK import, addTaskToChangeState, @temporalio/activity import, or ambient SDK declaration.
rows.notes: No remaining actionable touched-scope slop finding.

rows.evidence: Review found workflow correctness, deletion safety, gate behavior, worktree isolation, and worker singleton unchanged; focused tests and pnpm run check passed.
Conformance signal failure is now returned as signalWarning instead of debug-only logging; review found no correctness-sensitive failure hidden behind logs.
Spec delta rq-confSignalVisibility01 added in .adv/specs and mirrored docs; implementation/tests align to spec scenarios.
All verification commands run from plugin/ in worktree; Node/Vitest checks passed; no Bun-only runtime behavior added.
No Temporal workflow code or defineUpdate surface changed; workflow-bundle-boundary test included in focused suite passed.
Deletion proof used source import checks, package-manager evidence, typecheck/check, and focused tests; no single-tool heuristic deletion accepted.
Review and state access used ADV tools; no ADV state files were read directly.
No defineUpdate reintroduction; workflow-bundle-boundary focused test passed; recovery helper remains tool-layer safe.
Broad complexity scan findings documented as follow-up; no blind repo-wide complexity refactor performed.
Change completed through approved prep task graph; no split/shrink based solely on breadth.
No new ADV user-facing features unrelated to slop findings were implemented.
No broad style rewrite or repo-wide churn; complexity-only work recorded as follow-up.
Conformance work limited to signal failure visibility; no external test-source implementation or policy redesign.
No protected registration/generated/test/fixture/example/command surface deleted without structural proof; deleted items were unused helper/ambient declaration/direct dependency.

acceptanceCriteria: Conformance `lock`, `override`, and `run` responses surface a structured warning when workflow notification fails after local state save.
Rejected-signal tests cover conformance notification failure paths.
Every slop finding is recorded in a resolution matrix: fixed, removed with proof, wired, documented non-actionable, or follow-up.
No export or dependency is removed without structural evidence and passing focused verification.
Repeated poisoned-history recovery fallback is centralized or explicitly left unchanged with rationale.
High-complexity handlers are refactored only when needed for correctness or safe cleanup; remaining complexity-only hotspots become follow-ups with evidence.
`pnpm run check` passes from `plugin/`; relevant focused tests pass.
Follow-up slop/deterministic scan reports no remaining actionable findings in touched scope, or documents non-blocking findings.
